---

# Templates — Pokie Analyzer Consented Self-Logging Study

This directory contains the three participant-facing documents referenced in **§10** of
[`../consented-self-logging-plan.md`](../consented-self-logging-plan.md).
They expand the §10 summaries into standalone, ready-to-use templates.

---

## ⚠ Legal review required

**These are draft documents only.**
Do not distribute any of these files to participants, or use them in any session,
until the reviewing Queensland lawyer has read and approved a final version
(see §2 of the plan).
The lawyer-approved final version must be checked into `docs/` before any session is run.

---

## Files in this directory

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [`participant-information-sheet.md`](participant-information-sheet.md) | Full §10.1 expansion — plain-English description of what the study is, what data is collected, participant rights, and harm-minimisation safeguards. To be read and signed by every participant before their first session. |
| [`consent-form.md`](consent-form.md) | Full §10.2 expansion — signable consent form with checkbox statements covering data use, storage, harm-minimisation caps, and the optional still-photo opt-in/opt-out. |
| [`per-session-checklist.md`](per-session-checklist.md) | Full §10.3 expansion — printable card that every participant carries and works through before, during, and after each session. |

---

## How to use these templates

1. Send all three files (along with `../consented-self-logging-plan.md`) to the reviewing
   Queensland lawyer for sign-off.
2. Incorporate any changes the lawyer requires.
3. Check the final, lawyer-approved versions into `docs/` and note the approval date and
   lawyer's name on each document.
4. Only then issue the information sheet and consent form to participants and begin sessions.

---

*Source of truth: [`../consented-self-logging-plan.md`](../consented-self-logging-plan.md)*
